export const getPlacesByState = stateId => places.filter(p => p.stateId === stateId);
export const getStateById = id => states.find(s => s.id === id);
export const getPlaceById = id => places.find(p => p.id === id);
export const searchPlaces = query => {
  const q = query.toLowerCase();
  return places.filter(p => p.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) || p.city.toLowerCase().includes(q) || p.category.toLowerCase().includes(q) || p.stateId.toLowerCase().includes(q));
};

export const getPlacesByState = (stateId) =>
  places.filter((p) => p.stateId === stateId);

export const getStateById = (id) =>
  states.find((s) => s.id === id);

export const getPlaceById = (id) =>
  places.find((p) => p.id === id);

export const searchPlaces = (query) => {
  const q = query.toLowerCase();
  return places.filter(
    (p) =>
      p.name.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      p.city.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      p.category.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      p.stateId.toLowerCase().includes(q)
  );
};
